records.primary_evidence_text: 承气汤者，下药也
records.main_risk_reason: 短词二字且来源层为 promoted_from_full_risk_layer。
records.audit_focus: short therapeutic-category term promoted from mixed full passage
records.gold_reason: “承气汤者，下药也”是自足类属句，足以支撑短问法；但原 passage 同段混有汗下风险与《金匮玉函》材料，不能升 high。
records.gold_followup_action: 保留 safe primary + medium；后续只需防止把整段 full passage 抬入 primary。
records.notes: 这是可信任但必须维持 medium 的对象，不应用 strong 数量倒推 high。

records.primary_evidence_text: 表里俱病者，谓之两感
records.main_risk_reason: 来源层仍是 records_passages/full object。
records.audit_focus: compact disease-state definition from risk-layer passage
records.gold_reason: “表里俱病者，谓之两感”语义闭合，canonical identity 稳定；medium 的根因只是来源层不是干净 main-only。
records.gold_followup_action: 保持当前对象，不需要改 alias。
records.notes: learner 表面词“表里两感”合理，但不应扩成更宽泛的表里病机对象。

records.primary_evidence_text: 脉来动而中止，不能自还，因而复动， 名曰代阴也
records.main_risk_reason: variant note 污染源句，且与结阴共段。
records.audit_focus: pulse-pattern term with inline variant note in source row
records.gold_reason: primary evidence text 已抽出核心定义，术语身份成立；但 source sentence 带赵本异文，作为金标准只能保留 medium。
records.gold_followup_action: 下一轮若能保留 stripped sentence provenance，可考虑单独标注 variant-stripped primary。
records.notes: 当前不需要降级，但也不能升 high。

records.primary_evidence_text: 冬时感寒，伏藏于经中，不即发者，谓之伏气
records.main_risk_reason: promotion source layer 不是 safe main passage。
records.audit_focus: support-only concept promoted from full passage
records.gold_reason: “冬时感寒，伏藏于经中，不即发者，谓之伏气”定义完整；medium 仅因来源来自 full/risk 层。
records.gold_followup_action: 保持当前 safe primary；不扩大到整段伏寒解释。
records.notes: canonical term 稳定，learner alias“伏寒”需维持为辅助入口而非主对象替代。

records.primary_evidence_text: 太阳病吐之，但太阳病当恶寒，今反不恶寒，不欲近衣，此为吐之内烦也
records.main_risk_reason: 依赖误治/吐后上下文。
records.audit_focus: context-dependent symptom naming sentence
records.gold_reason: 句子能解释“内烦”在当前条文中的含义，但强依赖“太阳病吐之”语境，因此只可作为 medium safe primary。
records.gold_followup_action: 保留 current primary；回答层应继续携带上下文，不应泛化为独立病名。
records.notes: 不是 high；但不属于越界升格。

records.primary_evidence_text: 发汗药，须温暖服者，易为发散也
records.main_risk_reason: primary sentence 看起来像定义，实质是 explanation sentence。
records.audit_focus: therapeutic category where current primary is explanatory rather than definitional
records.gold_reason: “发汗药，须温暖服者，易为发散也”说明服法与药势，不是严格回答“发汗药是什么”的类属定义。
records.gold_followup_action: 下一轮应寻找更直接的 membership/definition sentence，或把当前对象标为 explanation-primary 而非 definition-primary。
records.notes: 本轮只提出裁决，不直接改 registry。

records.primary_evidence_text: 四逆者，四肢不温也
records.main_risk_reason: 短词与方名语境相邻，容易被 formula heuristic 污染。
records.audit_focus: learner high-frequency symptom/syndrome term
records.gold_reason: “四逆者，四肢不温也”短而闭合，alias“四肢不温/手足不温”合理；medium 仅因原句来自 full/risk 层。
records.gold_followup_action: 保持当前对象；持续防止被 formula composition 规则误伤。
records.notes: 上一轮角色修正后，该对象可作为 gold-safe-medium。

records.primary_evidence_text: 太阳病，三日中，曾经发汗、吐下、温针，虚其正气，病仍不解者，谓之坏病，言为医所坏病也
records.main_risk_reason: 上下文依赖强。
records.audit_focus: context-heavy disease-state definition promoted from full passage
records.gold_reason: 定义句自足且包含“为医所坏病”解释，但它的成立依赖误治上下文，因此不应升 high。
records.gold_followup_action: 保持 medium；不要把后续“随所逆而救之”整体并入 primary。
records.notes: 适合 answer primary，但不是可脱离上下文的术语词典项。

records.primary_evidence_text: 四时气候不正为病，谓之时行之气
records.main_risk_reason: alias 较短，容易被 broad disease queries 误召回。
records.audit_focus: learner alias 时气 mapped to canonical term
records.gold_reason: “四时气候不正为病，谓之时行之气”定义闭合，alias“时气”有学习者价值；medium 源于原载体层。
records.gold_followup_action: 保持当前 alias，但不要继续扩成广义疫病/时病解释对象。
records.notes: 当前 learner normalization 是合理的。

records.primary_evidence_text: 但结胸无大热者，非热结也，是水饮结于胸胁，谓之水结胸
records.main_risk_reason: 相邻方药使用句较多。
records.audit_focus: compound disease-state term with formula context nearby
records.gold_reason: 主句明确把“水饮结于胸胁”命名为水结胸，定义充分；medium 是因为同段还有大柴胡汤/大陷胸汤用法语境。
records.gold_followup_action: 保持当前 primary；formula usage 句继续留在 support/review。
records.notes: 不需要降级。

records.primary_evidence_text: 太阳病，关节疼痛而烦，脉沉而细者，此名湿痹
records.main_risk_reason: variant/editorial contamination in source sentence。
records.audit_focus: definition sentence with inline variant contamination
records.gold_reason: stripped primary text 可以独立解释湿痹，但原句含赵本注和一云材料，金标准上只能承认为 medium。
records.gold_followup_action: 后续可以把 stripped sentence provenance 显式写入 registry notes。
records.notes: 当前不越界，但不能升 high。

records.primary_evidence_text: 睡而汗出者，谓之盗汗
records.main_risk_reason: source layer medium。
records.audit_focus: high-frequency learner symptom term
records.gold_reason: “睡而汗出者，谓之盗汗”是非常干净的定义句，learner alias“睡着出汗”也合理；medium 只因来源层不是 high-safe main。
records.gold_followup_action: 保持当前对象；可作为 learner_short 稳定样本。
records.notes: 这是本轮金标准集中最稳的 medium 定义对象之一。

records.primary_evidence_text: 又脉来动而中止，更来小数，中有还者反动，名曰结阴也
records.main_risk_reason: 同段多术语共现，边界不宜放宽。
records.audit_focus: pulse-pattern term paired with 代阴
records.gold_reason: 命名句可独立成义，但与代阴同段且上下句是结代脉族解释，不能给 high。
records.gold_followup_action: 保留 medium；后续如拆脉象子段，可再评估 high。
records.notes: 当前 alias“结阴脉”可保留。

records.primary_evidence_text: 发汗吐下后，邪热乘虚客于胸中，谓之虚烦者热也，胸中烦热郁闷而不得发散者是也
records.main_risk_reason: definition sentence 偏长，解释与定义混合。
records.audit_focus: longer explanatory definition sentence from full layer
records.gold_reason: 句子虽长，但核心因果和命名关系完整；source layer 与病机解释混合，故维持 medium。
records.gold_followup_action: 保持当前对象；后续可考虑拆出更短 primary + explanation support。
records.notes: 不是降级对象，但存在后续 sentence compaction 空间。

records.primary_evidence_text: 男子病新瘥未平复，而妇人与之交，得病，名曰阳易
records.main_risk_reason: 同段 pair concept 和 umbrella term 共存。
records.audit_focus: paired concept after ambiguous alias cleanup
records.gold_reason: 阳易对象身份稳定，当前没有再把“阴阳易”强行归到阳易；medium 是因为同段同时定义易/阳易/阴易。
records.gold_followup_action: 继续禁止共享 alias“阴阳易”；若要支持该问法，应建 umbrella concept 而不是映射到阳易。
records.notes: 当前 canonical alias 可保留。

records.primary_evidence_text: 妇人病新瘥未平腹，男子与之交，得病，名曰阴易
records.main_risk_reason: 同段 pair concept 和 umbrella term 共存。
records.audit_focus: paired concept after ambiguous alias cleanup
records.gold_reason: 阴易对象身份稳定，已避免与阳易共享“阴阳易”alias；medium 合理。
records.gold_followup_action: 继续禁止共享 alias；如需恢复“阴阳易”，必须先单建 umbrella concept。
records.notes: 当前不需要再改。

records.primary_evidence_text: 乌梅丸方：乌梅三百个。赵本作「枚」。味酸温 细辛六两。辛热 乾姜十两。辛热 黄连一斤。
records.main_risk_reason: composition span incomplete and editorial variant contamination。
records.audit_focus: remaining formula medium object
records.gold_reason: 当前 passage 只覆盖组成开头，且带赵本“枚/个”异文；不能判为完整高置信方文。
records.gold_followup_action: 下一轮补完整 composition span，再决定是否升 high。
records.notes: 本轮仅裁决，不直接补 formula span。

records.primary_evidence_text: 旋复代赭石赵本无「石」字汤方：旋复花三两。味咸温 人参二两。味甘温 生姜五两，切。味辛温 半夏半升，洗。味辛温 代赭石赵本无「石」字，一两。味苦寒 大枣十二枚，擘。甘温 甘草三两，炙。味甘平
records.main_risk_reason: heading and composition contain inline variant notes。
records.audit_focus: remaining formula medium object
records.gold_reason: 标题和药味均含赵本无“石”字，且缺 decoction/usage span；medium 合理。
records.gold_followup_action: 清理 canonical title display 与 composition span 后再复核。
records.notes: 本轮仅裁决，不直接补 formula span。

records.primary_evidence_text: 栀子浓朴汤方：栀子十四枚，赵本作个，擘。味苦寒 浓朴四两，姜炙。赵本作炙，去皮，苦温 枳实四枚，水浸，去穣，炒。，赵本作「炙令黄」，味苦寒
records.main_risk_reason: variant-heavy composition-only object。
records.audit_focus: remaining formula medium object
records.gold_reason: 当前只有药味组成行，且多处赵本异文；可检索但不可升 high。
records.gold_followup_action: 补煎服/用法 span 或明确 composition-only formula policy。
records.notes: 本轮仅裁决，不直接补 formula span。

records.primary_evidence_text: 桂枝甘草龙骨牡蛎汤方：桂枝一两，赵本有「去皮」二字 甘草二两，赵本有「炙」字 牡蛎二两，熬 龙骨二两
records.main_risk_reason: composition-only with editorial variants。
records.audit_focus: remaining formula medium object
records.gold_reason: 对象身份成立，但当前行只有组成且含去皮/炙异文；缺少完整方文边界证据。
records.gold_followup_action: 补齐 span 与 variant-stripped composition display。
records.notes: 本轮仅裁决，不直接补 formula span。

records.primary_evidence_text: 茵陈蒿汤方：茵陈蒿六两。苦微寒 栀子十四枚，擘。苦寒 大黄二两，去皮。苦寒
records.main_risk_reason: missing decoction and usage span。
records.audit_focus: remaining formula medium object
records.gold_reason: 组成行干净度尚可，但缺少煎服/用法 span；继续 medium 更稳。
records.gold_followup_action: 查找相邻煎服句并补 span。
records.notes: 本轮仅裁决，不直接补 formula span。

records.primary_evidence_text: 麻黄附子甘草汤方：麻黄二两，去节 甘草二两，炙 附子一枚，炮，去皮。赵本有「破八片」三字
records.main_risk_reason: composition variant note and missing usage/decoction span。
records.audit_focus: remaining formula medium object
records.gold_reason: 方名和组成稳定，但附子炮制处含赵本异文，且缺少后续用法边界。
records.gold_followup_action: 补 span 并记录 variant-stripped 药味。
records.notes: 本轮仅裁决，不直接补 formula span。

records.primary_evidence_text: 神丹者，发汗之药也
records.main_risk_reason: not learner-facing canonical primary definition。
records.audit_focus: review-only boundary object
records.gold_reason: “神丹者，发汗之药也”有类属信息，但对象更像注释汇编中的药名训诂，缺少独立 canonical 支撑。
records.gold_followup_action: 若后续要升格，必须找到非注释汇编层的稳定药名证据。
records.notes: 当前证据主要来自 full/annotation 汇编层，缺少足够独立的 canonical 支撑。

records.primary_evidence_text: 大黄谓之将军，以苦荡涤
records.main_risk_reason: drug nickname rather than primary concept definition。
records.audit_focus: review-only boundary object
records.gold_reason: “大黄谓之将军”偏药名别称/训诂，不应作为当前 definition family 的 safe primary。
records.gold_followup_action: 若要支持，应先建立药名别称对象层，而不是放入 general definition safe primary。
records.notes: 属于药名解释层，不是当前 definition family 的高优先安全对象。

records.primary_evidence_text: 风与火气，谓之两阳
records.main_risk_reason: context-dependent pathology phrase。
records.audit_focus: review-only boundary object
records.gold_reason: “风与火气，谓之两阳”必须依赖后续病机展开；单句对普通学习者不够自足。
records.gold_followup_action: 下一轮需要一组病机解释 support object，而不是只升格命名句。
records.notes: 单句命名可以抽出，但对普通学习者仍高度依赖后续病机展开，暂不作为 safe primary。

records.primary_evidence_text: 有病口苦者，名曰胆瘅
records.main_risk_reason: commentary-dependent definition sentence。
records.audit_focus: review-only boundary object
records.gold_reason: 核心句来自《内经》曰式 commentarial citation；当前降级正确，不能恢复 safe primary。
records.gold_followup_action: 建议清理 review-only 对象上的 learner aliases“口苦病/胆瘅病”，防止未来 runtime 误启用。
records.notes: primary sentence directly depends on commentary citation《内经》曰，当前不宜作为 learner-facing safe primary。
